Sweet. Spicy. Dangerously easy to make 😈 🥃 The Devil’s Soda is your new go-to! Just 3 ingredients, full recipe at the link in bio… if you dare!

Mix up our signature Spicy Soul Ties marg for a spicy twist to enjoy during tonight's @loveislandusa episode!

2 1/2 oz Devil’s Reserve™ 
1/2 oz Orange Liqueur
1 oz Fresh Lime Juice
1/4 oz Agave Nectar

Run a lime wedge along a margarita glass rim.
Dip the glass into a dish of chili-salt for the perfect spicy rim. Set aside.
Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake well and strain over fresh ice in your prepared glass.
Garnish with devilish limes.
